title: Add loosefruit UI section in MainWindow duplicate cleanup tab
description: Add third QGroupBox in _build_duplicate_cleanup_tab() after Task Register section. Fields: Period Month/Year (QSpinBox, default from config), LocCode (QLineEdit, default from selected division), Dry Run (QCheckBox, default True), Limit (QSpinBox, default 1000). Fetch button -> LoosefruitFetchWorker -> QTableWidget 6 cols (DocID, DocDate, LocCode, AccMonth, Status, Amount). Delete button -> LoosefruitDeleteWorker -> RunPayload with duplicate_targets. Mirror TaskRegisterFetchWorker pattern.

criteria: QGroupBox 'Loosefruit duplicate (_)' with period, loc_code, dry_run, limit controls
QTableWidget populated with loosefruit records after fetch
Delete button enabled only when rows selected; triggers RunPayload + RunnerBridge
Layout follows existing QGroupBox pattern in duplicate cleanup tab
